# Night Session Rules

## SCAN ALL SPORTS IN NIGHT WINDOW
- Night window 22:00-05:59 CEST has MASSIVE boards across ALL sports
- NEVER limit scan to just NBA + NHL
- South American football: Copa do Brasil, Liga MX, Bolivia, Ecuador, Argentina
- MLB: 12-15 games nightly 01:00-05:00 CEST
- NBA: check ALL games not just featured
- NHL: 3-5 games nightly
- Also: Brazil NBB, Venezuela, Puerto Rico BSN basketball
- Also: Challenger + ITF tennis in Americas
- Also: MLS/USL soccer

## Lesson 2026-04-23
- Declared NO BET after checking only 2 events. Missed 28 football + 14 MLB + 3 NBA + 4 NHL + tennis
- CRITICAL STEP 1 failure. Fix: full sport-by-sport scan for night, same rigor as day
